properties.displayName: Restrict creation of Azure MySQL Single Server
properties.description: Azure Database for MySQL - Single Server is on the retirement path and Azure Database for MySQL - Single Server is scheduled for retirement by September 16, 2024.
nonComplianceMessages: MySQL database Single server does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: MySQL Single server creation is blocked. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code.
